2604.19645.title: The signal is the ceiling: Measurement limits of LLM-predicted experience ratings from open-ended survey text
2604.19645.paper_summary: An earlier paper (Hong, Potteiger, and Zapata 2026) established that an unoptimized GPT 4.1 prompt predicts fan-reported experience ratings within one point 67% of the time from open-ended survey text. This paper tests the relative impact of prompt design and model selection on that performance. We compared four configurations on approximately 10,000 post-game surveys from five MLB teams: the original baseline prompt and a moderately customized version, crossed with three GPT models (4.1, 4.1-mini, 5.2). Prompt customization added roughly two percentage points of within +/-1 agreement on GPT 4.1 (from 67% to 69%). Both model swaps from that best configuration degraded performance: GPT 5.2 returned to the baseline, and GPT 4.1-mini fell six percentage points below it. Both levers combined were dwarfed by the input itself: across capable configurations, accuracy varied more than an order of magnitude more by the linguistic character of the text than by the choice of prompt or model. The ceiling has two parts. One is a bias in how the model reads text, which prompt design can correct. The other is a difference between what fans write about and what they actually decide, which no engineering can close because the missing information is not in the text. Prompt customization moved the first part; model selection moved neither reliably. The result is not that "prompt engineering helps a little" but that prompt engineering helps in a specific and predictable way, on the part of the ceiling it can reach.
2604.19645.paper_summary_zh: 一篇早期的論文（Hong, Potteiger, 和 Zapata 2026）確立了一個未經優化的 GPT 4.1 提示能夠在開放式調查文本中以 67% 的頻率預測粉絲報告的體驗評分，誤差在一分之內。本文測試了提示設計和模型選擇對該性能的相對影響。我們比較了四種配置，基於來自五支 MLB 球隊的約 10,000 份賽後調查：原始基準提示和一個中度自定義的版本，並交叉使用三個 GPT 模型（4.1、4.1-mini、5.2）。提示自定義使 GPT 4.1 在 +/-1 的一致性上增加了大約兩個百分點（從 67% 提升至 69%）。從最佳配置中更換的兩個模型都降低了性能：GPT 5.2 回到了基準，而 GPT 4.1-mini 則下降了六個百分點。這兩個因素的結合被輸入本身所淹沒：在可行配置中，準確性因文本的語言特徵而變化的幅度超過了一個數量級，遠超過提示或模型的選擇。上限有兩個部分。一個是模型閱讀文本的偏差，這可以通過提示設計來修正。另一個是粉絲所寫的內容與他們實際決定之間的差異，這是任何工程都無法彌補的，因為缺失的信息不在文本中。提示自定義移動了第一部分；模型選擇則沒有可靠地移動任何部分。結果不是「提示工程稍有幫助」，而是提示工程在特定且可預測的方式上有所幫助，針對它能達到的上限部分。
2604.19645.author: Andrew Hong et.al.
2604.19645.authors: Andrew Hong, Jason Potteiger, Luis E. Zapata
